creator: rnoland@2hip.net
text:
Beryl has been un-supported for a while now, people should
be using compiz now.  We need to deprecate beryl and it's associated
ports.

x11-wm/beryl
x11-wm/beryl-core
x11-wm/beryl-manager
x11-wm/beryl-plugins
x11-wm/beryl-plugins-unsupported
x11-wm/beryl-settings
x11-wm/beryl-settings-bindings
